message:
Add coverage tests for patterns renderFilterBar filter types

Add tests for suggest and add filter type branches in renderFilterBar:
- TestRenderFilterBarSuggestType: tests blue styling for suggest filter
- TestRenderFilterBarAddType: tests green styling for add filter

Coverage for renderFilterBar improved from 81% to 100%.
Package coverage improved from 96.7% to 98.9%.
